apiKinds.action: Emits an activation event without owning a value.
apiKinds.textInput: Owns a controlled string value through native text input.
apiKinds.choiceInput: Owns a controlled selection from typed options.
apiKinds.numericInput: Owns a controlled numeric value and range.
apiKinds.dateInput: Owns a controlled date or time value.
apiKinds.navigation: Coordinates selection or actions in native navigation UI.
apiKinds.status: Communicates progress, state, or a compact value.
apiKinds.presentation: Uses the platform presentation mechanism and dismissal model.

maturityLevels.stable: Native implementation, behavioral tests, accessibility checks, Catalog example, and consumer documentation are complete.
maturityLevels.beta: Native behavior exists but at least one acceptance area is incomplete.
maturityLevels.planned: The public contract is reserved but the platform implementation is not production-ready.
